definition.description:
Update an existing Mailing List. Specified fields are updated,
and no change to other fields. An empty Mailing List will remove all members.

address.description: Update the existing emails in the Mailing List.
address.name: address

addressToAdd.description: Add specific emails to the current Mailing List.
addressToAdd.name: addressToAdd

addressToRemove.description: Remove specific emails from the current Mailing List.
addressToRemove.name: addressToRemove

admin.description: Update the existing CMA admins in the Mailing List.
admin.name: admin

adminToAdd.description: Add CMA admins to the current Mailing List.
adminToAdd.name: adminToAdd

adminToRemove.description: Remove CMA admins from the current Mailing List.
adminToRemove.name: adminToRemove

mailingList.description: The Mailing List to be updated.
mailingList.name: mailingList

by.description:
Specify the Mailing List by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

definition.name: UpdateMailingListInput

updateMailingList.description:
Updates an existing Mailing List.
Only specified attributes in the input will be updated,
no changes to other attributes.

Usage limits:
- Maximum number of members in each Mailing List: 1,000.
updateMailingList.name: updateMailingList

definition.description: Returns the details of an updated Mailing List after a successful request.

Represents a Mailing List entity, including its
unique ID, name, type, associated email addresses, administrators,
and audit metadata.

address.description: List of email addresses included in the Mailing List.
address.name: address

admin.description: List of account administrators assigned to manage the Mailing List.
admin.name: admin

definition.description: A reference identifying the Admin object. ID: Unique Admin Identifier, Name: The Admin Name
definition.name: AdminRef

audit.description: Audit metadata containing creation and modification details.
audit.name: audit

AdminRef.description: A reference identifying the Admin object. ID: Unique Admin Identifier, Name: The Admin Name
AdminRef.name: AdminRef

ApiKeyRef.description: A reference identifying the ApiKey object. ID: Unique ApiKey Identifier, Name: The ApiKey Name
ApiKeyRef.name: ApiKeyRef

id.description: Unique identifier of the Mailing List.
id.name: id

type.description: Specifies how the Mailing List addresses are defined (e.g., all admins, specific_emails, system).
type.name: type

definition.name: MailingList
UpdateMailingListPayload
